patch.value: Model-agnostic search: provider settable via pm config + docs + index staleness surfacing

From search/docs review (pm-a0w4). Core IS model-agnostic (openai+ollama provider types, base_url/model/api_key config-driven; LM Studio/vLLM work via openai provider with custom base_url). Gaps: (C-1) CONFIG_KEY_ALIASES has zero search/provider/embedding keys, so pointing pm at LM Studio/custom OpenAI requires hand-editing settings.json — add CLI config keys. (D-2) CONFIGURATION.md never shows a concrete custom-provider example and never names LM Studio/vLLM — making model-agnostic config undiscoverable. (C-3) No onWrite index hook; semantic/hybrid read a pre-built store and require manual pm reindex — surface index staleness at query time or add incremental on-write indexing. (C-4) CLI search defaults to FULL projection (token-heavy); MCP defaults compact — consider --compact default for CLI.
